title: Financial Advisor
scenario: Design a chatbot persona for a financial planning service that targets individuals aged 25-50. The persona should provide advice on budgeting, saving, and investing. Ensure the persona is 150 words or less.

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the persona have a professional tone?
Does the persona description adhere to the word limit and tone constraints?
Does the persona use a clear and concise language style?
